case_title: TRIMARK ERF, INC VS. GREEN VALLEY MARKET PRODUCE INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,496.08 FILED BY TRIMARK ERF, INC AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN VALLEY MARKET PRODUCE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $55.00 SERVED FEB-03-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN VALLEY MARKET PRODUCE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-01-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PROOF OF SERVICE THAT WAS FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF ON MARCH 29, 2012 IS INVALID. PROOF OF SERVICE FORM, SC-104, INDICATES THAT THE CLAIM WAS MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON FEBRUARY 3, 2012 AND SUB-SERVED ON MARCH 2, 2012. PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT THE COURT'S CONTINUANCE ORDER IS NOT PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED APR-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN VALLEY MARKET PRODUCE INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED APR-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN VALLEY MARKET PRODUCE INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN VALLEY MARKET PRODUCE INC. $2,496.08 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,601.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN VALLEY MARKET PRODUCE INC.
